content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Prefixes and Suffixes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/432/problem/D
constraints: s consists of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains a string s of length n.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the length of the longest common prefix of s and its reverse.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Compare characters from the start and end of the string, moving towards the center.

code.Python3:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    s = input()
    n = len(s)
    i, j = 0, n - 1
    while i < j and s[i] == s[j]:
        i += 1
        j -= 1
    print(i + (n - j - 1))
